title: AudioPlayer Blanks
description: A mod adding blank Music Discs and Goat Horns for use with the AudioPlayer mod.  These items are dyeable in the full range of Minecraft colors- all 5+ million colors!
body:
## Description
With the [AudioPlayer](https://modrinth.com/mod/audioplayer) mod, the possibilities for Music Disc and Goat Horn sounds are endless.  But what if you want your custom sound items to stand out with a splash of color?  Enter _AudioPlayer Blanks_, a mod that allows you to create Music Discs and Goat Horns, each with 2 dyeable segments.

### Features (as of version 1.21.6-1.0.2):
- Custom Music Disc crafted with an Audio Label and a Stripped Music Disc
- Custom Goat Horn crafted with an Audio Label and a Stripped Goat Horn
- Audio Label crafted using 4 paper and 1 redstone dust, dyeable, provides the color for the center label of the Custom Music Disc and wrapping of the Custom Goat Horn
- Stripped Music Disc crafted by smelting a valid Music Disc, dyeable, provides the color for the custom disc itself
- Stripped Goat Horn crafted by smelting a valid Goat Horn, dyeable, provides the color for the outsides of the custom horn
- Audio Label, Stripped Music Disc, and Stripped Goat Horn dye color can be removed by interacting with a Cauldron with water in it
- Default sounds of a record scratch and pop for Custom Music Discs and a kazoo toot for Custom Goat Horns
- Sound items can be assigned a sound using the AudioPlayer mod (run the command `/audioplayer` for more information)
- Mod functions without AudioPlayer installed, but is infinitely more useful once it is installed
- Required on both server and client

Looking for audio to put on the blank discs? Try our mod [Downloading Discs](https://modrinth.com/mod/downloading-discs)!

## Support
If you have a bug report, feature request, or any other type of issue, please post on our GitHub [issues page](https://github.com/DentedLeft/Dented-Modding/issues).  This is an issues page for all of our mods, so be sure to include the mod's name and version in your post.  We appreciate all feedback!

If you'd like to support development, you can leave a tip at our [BuyMeACoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/dentedleft).  Only if it's within your means- otherwise, using, sharing, and enjoying the mod is support enough.  Thank you!

## Credits
*Music Disc "Blank" sound derived from [this sound](https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/record-scratch-skip-loop-60359/) by TRP, used under the [Pixabay Content License](https://pixabay.com/service/license-summary/).*

*Goat Horn "Toot" sound derived from [this sound](https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/kazoo-99784/) by insanity54, used under the [Pixabay Content License](https://pixabay.com/service/license-summary/).*

_Inspired by [ellediscs](https://modrinth.com/mod/ellediscs) by ellestuff._
